headline: Q4 Earnings Highlights: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) Vs The Rest Of The Household Products Stocks
summary: As the Q4 earnings season comes to a close, it’s time to take stock of this quarter’s best and worst performers in the household products industry, including Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) and its peers.

headline: Gain® Invites You to Sniff the Difference with New Gain Plus Collection and Upgraded Core Favorites
summary: CINCINNATI, March 02, 2026--Gain, the go-to detergent known for spreading joy through long-lasting, irresistible scents is turning up the fragrance, freshness, and cleansing power with the introduction of Gain Plus—so consumers can truly Sniff the Difference. This new collection features a packaging design refresh, and breakthrough formulas with advanced cleaning and scent performance – a scent difference you not only smell but also feel. headline: 189-year-old Dividend King unveils $10 billion payout plan
summary: Procter & Gamble has been paying dividends for more than a century. In 2026, it made one of its biggest shareholder commitments ever. The Dow Jones Dividend King is the consumer goods giant behind Tide, Pampers, Gillette, and dozens of other household brands. It recently disclosed plans ...

headline: Spruce Weed & Grass Killer Lets One More Dog Out of the House
summary: CINCINNATI, March 02, 2026--After famously solving one of pop culture’s greatest mysteries by unveiling "Spruce Let The Dogs Out," Spruce Weed & Grass Killer is ready to unleash its next big move. Today, the P&G Ventures brand is expanding its pack with the introduction of a new mascot: Bruce the Spruce Dog!

headline: Beat the Market the Zacks Way: Contineum Therapeutics, Suzano, PepsiCo in Focus
summary: Contineum Therapeutics surged 27% after a Zacks Rank upgrade, spotlighting how Zacks' strategies are beating a volatile market.
